description: Discovery heuristic (REFINED ADR-014): (a) bias toward forcing-functions that are recent AND whose obligation type is genuinely NOVEL/surprising (incumbents could not pre-build) — NOT merely a recent effective date on a long-telegraphed reg; (b) sharp defensive sub-wedges where NO incumbent has productized the artifact (OPP-001b pattern). STRONG SIGNAL: 4 consecutive compliance-forcing-function plays capped (OPP-001 79/002 71/003 72/004 63) -> 'pick the newest regulation' is itself an anti-pattern; compliance SaaS is a crowded fast-incumbent category. Forward bias: leave regulatory-compliance entirely (operational/financial/contractual pain, clear high-ticket buyer, no dominant incumbent), OR pass an AFFIRMATIVE named-incumbent vacuum check (name the incumbents, show the specific artifact none sell) BEFORE entering a compliance regime.
notes: Refined by TASK-0018/ADR-014 (OPP-004 EU Pay Transparency ARCHIVE 63). Load-bearing for next discovery cycle.
